guardrails: Ownership policy is evidence metadata only, not hidden file locking
Agent outputs remain untrusted until Rust/local validation and review-gated apply or promotion
Conflicts block or escalate instead of silently overwriting files
boundary: Fixture-scoped ownership policy only; it does not lock files, spawn agents, execute commands, apply changes, merge PRs, write trusted browser state, or mutate source files.

blockedReasons: Source-like target requires explicit review escalation before any future ownership acceptance

escalation.reason: Source-like Rust target requires trusted review before ownership can be accepted
escalation.safeNextAction: defer work package until #668 conflict detection and review gates validate the target
